title: Obot Workshop: GitHub Auth, MCP, and Audit End-to-End
description: A complete Obot walkthrough: log in with the bootstrap token, set up GitHub authentication, add the GitHub MCP server to Claude, query your repositories, review the audit log, then install and enroll the Obot Sentry client, scan your inventory, automate scanning with hooks, and forward a local MCP server's audit logs to Obot.

steps.title: Log In with the Bootstrap Token
Add the GitHub MCP Server to Claude
Install and Enroll the Obot Sentry Client
Forward Local MCP Audit Logs to Obot
